/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/gateway.dir/src/gateway_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gateway.dir/src/authenticator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gateway.dir/src/redis_rate_limiter.cpp.o -o bin/gateway  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so _deps/spdlog-build/libspdlog.a -lhiredis /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
